label: Stål- och metallframställning
description: Scaffold för företag inom stål- och metallframställning med fokus på produktionskapacitet, processer, kvalitet, leveransförmåga och tydlig kontaktväg för offert eller dialog.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende genom process-, kvalitets- och anläggningsinformation
göra det enkelt att ta kontakt för offert, materialförfrågan eller samarbete

routes.purpose: Positionera verksamheten, förklara vad företaget tillverkar eller bearbetar och leda till kontakt.
Visa huvudsakliga stål- eller metallprodukter, materialslag eller produktkategorier på ett konkret sätt.
Beskriva tillverknings- eller bearbetningsprocesser, kapacitet och hur uppdrag hanteras från förfrågan till leverans.
Bygga förtroende genom företagspresentation, anläggning, arbetssätt och team.
Göra det enkelt att komma i kontakt för offert, materialfrågor, leveransdialog eller besök.

routes.when: when the company has documented quality, testing, traceability or sustainability work worth describing
when the company serves distinct customer segments such as bygg, verkstad, energi or industri and needs segment-specific messaging

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the business type and what is produced, processed or supplied, with a primary contact CTA.
Production summary must be concrete about materials, product types or manufacturing focus rather than generic industrial wording.
Trust proof must rely on real signals such as experience, facility information, delivery capability, visible company details or named references when available.
Facility overview, product highlights and process highlights may appear before trust proof when supported by source data.
Sections should avoid repeating the same claims about quality, precision or reliability.
Products intro must explain what categories, materials or formats the company offers.
Product list items must be specific, for example material groups, semi-finished products, dimensions, finishing options or customer-adapted production.
Do not imply stock levels, delivery times or standards unless such details are actually provided.
Processes intro must connect the company's production setup to customer needs such as repeatability, volume, tolerance or further processing.
Process list must describe real manufacturing or processing steps and not generic business services.
Workflow should show a plausible sequence such as inquiry, specification, production, control and delivery without inventing guarantees.
About story must describe the company, its production focus or history in specific terms.
Facility overview should focus on plant, equipment environment or way of working if data exists.
Team is optional in rendering if no staff data is available, but the route structure should support it.
Contact info must include real available contact paths such as phone, email, address or contact form.
If map or visit information is shown, it should help visitors find the site or understand how visits and goods reception work.
No placeholder contact details may be used.

mustPass: Route set is adapted to stål- och metallframställning through products and processes pages.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Paths are Swedish, lowercase and start with '/'.
Recommended dossiers only use allowed ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure without industrial production context.
Vague claims about quality, capacity or certifications without source support.
Consumer-oriented sections that do not fit B2B manufacturing intent.
Invented standards, testing regimes, volumes or delivery promises.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Industriscaffold för stål- och metallframställning som prioriterar produktöversikt, processbeskrivning, anläggningsförtroende, kvalitetsarbete och kontakt för offert eller samarbete.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the company primarily manufactures, processes or supplies steel and metal products in an industrial B2B context.
Prefer this over a generic service-business scaffold when product categories, material types, production processes or plant capabilities are central to the offering.
Quality and process transparency matter more than lifestyle branding for this industry.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
